mapper.sql: id, name, credit_code, start_date, oper_name, status, address, qcc_order_no, qcc_data_status, qcc_tax_data, qcc_order_expire_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM jc_enterprise WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT e.id, e.name, e.credit_code, e.start_date, e.oper_name, e.status, e.address, e.qcc_order_no, e.qcc_data_status, e.qcc_tax_data, e.qcc_order_expire_at, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM jc_enterprise e JOIN zj_user_enterprise_relation r ON e.id = r.enterprise_id WHERE e.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.user_open_id = #{openid} ORDER BY e.id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.update: UPDATE jc_enterprise SET deleted = 0 WHERE credit_code = #{creditCode} AND deleted = 1
